title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed 15,000 potential binding sites and narrowed them to 15 viable targets for validation using minimal computational resources.
